name: mini-shai-hulud-atool-test
description: Test fixture for May 2026 Mini Shai-Hulud AntV/atool wave (2026-05-19): 637 versions across 317 packages published by the compromised `atool` npm account, payload via preinstall: bun run index.js (SHA256 a68dd1e6a6e35ec3771e1f94fe796f55dfe65a2b94560516ff4ac189390dfa1c). The companion index.js file in this directory holds the inert content-pattern IoCs (C2 domain, beacon string, orphan-commit SHAs, etc.) so the detector's check_mini_shai_hulud_indicators function exercises every May 19 string-based check end-to-end.
